title: Iron Ore Outlook: Simandou Supply, China Demand and Freight Trends
section_path: Iron Ore Outlook: Simandou Supply, China Demand and Freight Trends
section_path_text: Iron Ore Outlook: Simandou Supply, China Demand and Freight Trends
summary:
Main
In this week's Allied Quantumsea Research, we review the evolving iron ore market landscape as 2026 begins, focusing on the widening gap between price performance and underlying fundamentals. We examine the early implications of Simandou's first shipments, assess China's steel demand and inventory dynamics, and evaluate how these factors are shaping both iron ore pricing and Capesize freight markets. Image reference: Στιγμιότυπο οθόνης 2026-01-21 110910.png
Market Overview: Price Strength Versus Fundamentals
Iron ore markets entered 2026 showing a clear divergence between price performance and physical fundamentals.
